Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Sara B. Brody, Esq., for Non-party and moving: Goldman Sachs & Co.
Robert R. Riggs, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Jamestown Equite Partners, LLC
Scott E. Henning, Esq., and Meredith A. Jones, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Thompson Pacific Corporation

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted and clarified that dismissal of order of examiantion is without prejudice. Non-party Goldman Sachs' motion to dismiss the order for appearance and examination is Granted. The order for appearance and examination is dismissed. While CCP Section 491.110 permits the declaration to be made upon information and belief, the declaration does not set forth any facts in support of the order.
